title: Survival Renewed
description: A Mod That Makes The Beginning Of The Game A Tad Harder
body:
This mod makes the begining of the game harder for those who want that. You must get a flint axe to break logs. this is crafted with two flint, a vine, and a stick. Vines can be crafted from Grass Threads, dropped by short and tall grass

You can make a sift to get flint more easily! (drop rate goes up with it!)
